title: Job Openings at Career Breedge Consultancy Limited
content:
Career Breedge Consultancy Limited is a comprehensive Talent Development and Management organization committed to empowering young, aspiring professionals and equipping businesses with bespoke HR solutions.

Through world-class professional training, counseling, and skills development programs, we help job seekers and career professionals become sought-after talents while assisting businesses in optimizing their workforce for maximum productivity.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Architect

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Are you innovative, detailed, and passionate about delivering premium residential and commercial designs?
	We are seeking a skilled Architect to join our project team.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop architectural concepts and 3D presentations
	Prepare detailed drawings and working plans
	Supervise project execution on-site
	Ensure designs comply with building codes and regulations
	Work closely with engineers and project managers


Requirements


	B.Sc. / M.Sc. Degree in Architecture
	2–4 years of experience
	Proficiency in AutoCAD, Revit, SketchUp, Lumion, etc.
	Strong knowledge of Nigerian building regulations
	Excellent presentation and communication skills


Expected Performance Standards:


	Strong communication and negotiation skills
	Ability to work independently and in a team
	High level of professionalism and integrity
	Goal-oriented with a strong drive for results
	Good knowledge of real estate trends.


Application Closing Date: 30th March, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their applications and CV to admin@endlexgroup.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

 

 

2.) Civil Engineer

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are committed to structural excellence and quality delivery, and hence we are looking for a competent Civil Engineer to oversee and execute construction projects effectively.


Key Responsibilities


	Supervise construction projects from start to finish
	Conduct site assessments and quality control checks
	Ensure structural integrity and compliance
	Manage contractors and site workers
	Monitor timelines, budgets, and safety standards.


Requirements


	B.Eng./HND in Civil Engineering
	Minimum of 3 years of construction experience
	Strong technical and site management skills
	Proficiency in engineering software
	Excellent leadership and problem-solving ability.


Expected Performance Standards:


	Strong communication and negotiation skills
	Ability to work independently and in a team
	High level of professionalism and integrity
	Goal-oriented with a strong drive for results.


Application Closing Date: 15th March, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified persons should send their applications and CV to admin@endlexgroup.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

 

 

3.) Marketing and Sales Executives

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Responsibilities


	Generate and convert leads
	Conduct site inspections with prospective clients
	Promote our property listings and investment packages
	Meet and exceed assigned sales targets
	Provide daily marketing and sales reports


Requirements


	Minimum of OND /HND /B.Sc. Degree in related field
	Strong sales and negotiation skills
	Good knowledge of Port Harcourt environment
	Experience in real estate marketing is an added advantage
	Must be confident, presentable, and target-driven&Expected Performance Standards:
	Strong communication and negotiation skills
	Ability to work independently and in a team
	High level of professionalism and integrity
	Goal-oriented with a strong drive for results
	Good knowledge of local real estate market trends


Expected Performance Standards:


	Strong communication and negotiation skills
	Ability to work independently and in a team
	High level of professionalism and integrity
	Goal-oriented with a strong drive for results
	Good knowledge of local real estate market trends


What We Offer


	Attractive salary + high commission structure
	Performance bonuses
	Brand support and marketing materials
	Opportunity for rapid career growth.


Application Closing Date: 30th March, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV in PDF to: admin@endlexgroup.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

     

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Customer Service Officer",
  "description": "Fastest Cakes is a registered brand in Nigeria that focuses on delivering awesome and affordable cakes very fast. The company is deeply committed to ensuring that ordering and getting cakes for occasions is seamless and fun. The core team has some serious experience and has successfully produced and delivered over 10,000 cakes unscathed in Lagos.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Customer Service Officer
Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki, Lagos

Job description


	We are looking for Customer service officers who will directly work with customers to take orders, answer their questions, and provide additional support where needed.


Responsibilities


	Responding promptly to customer inquiries.
	Communicating with customers through various channels.
	Acknowledging and resolving customer complaints.
	Excellent knowledge of our products to be able to solve customer issues.
	Ensuring all customer orders are processed efficiently.
	Keeping records of customer interactions, transactions, comments, and complaints.
	Maintaining a positive, courteous, empathetic, and professional attitude toward customers at all times.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a Bachelor&#39;s Degree with at least 1 year of work experience.
	Candidate must reside near Lekki Phase 1
	Must have completed the National Youth Service Corps (NYSC)
	Proven customer support experience
	Must speak and write crisp and clear English
	Must be able to work on some weekends and holidays.
	Work from the office 23 days a month
	Should be willing to work with the company long term.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;admin@fastestcakes.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Customer Service Officer Job at Fastest Cakes Limited




        
    

        
        Fastest Cakes is a registered brand in Nigeria that focuses on delivering awesome and affordable cakes very fast. The company is deeply committed to ensuring that ordering and getting cakes for occasions is seamless and fun. The core team has some serious experience and has successfully produced and delivered over 10,000 cakes unscathed in Lagos.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Officer
Job Location: Lekki, Lagos

Job description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for Customer service officers who will directly work with customers to take orders, answer their questions, and provide additional support where needed.


Responsibilities


	Responding promptly to customer inquiries.
	Communicating with customers through various channels.
	Acknowledging and resolving customer complaints.
	Excellent knowledge of our products to be able to solve customer issues.
	Ensuring all customer orders are processed efficiently.
	Keeping records of customer interactions, transactions, comments, and complaints.
	Maintaining a positive, courteous, empathetic, and professional attitude toward customers at all times.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a Bachelor's Degree with at least 1 year of work experience.
	Candidate must reside near Lekki Phase 1
	Must have completed the National Youth Service Corps (NYSC)
	Proven customer support experience
	Must speak and write crisp and clear English
	Must be able to work on some weekends and holidays.
	Work from the office 23 days a month
	Should be willing to work with the company long term.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: admin@fastestcakes.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "IT & Network Support Manager",
  "description": "CashXpress Nigeria Limited, a fast-paced fintech organisation in Lagos, Nigeria, is recruiting to fill the following positions below:

Job Position: IT&nbsp; &amp; Network Support Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary&nbsp;


	We are seeking a proactive IT professional to manage and optimize our network, telephony, and IT infrastructure.
	You will ensure smooth operations of our LAN, wireless systems, routers, switches, and telephone gateways, while providing technical support and troubleshooting for our team.


Key&nbsp;Responsibilities&nbsp;


	Configure, manage, and maintain network devices (routers, switches, LAN/WAN, wireless) and telephone gateways.
	Provide PC troubleshooting, software support, and hardware maintenance.
	Ensure optimal network performance and IT security practices.
	Assist management with ad hoc IT tasks and office technology needs.


What&nbsp; we&#39;re Looking For


	A bachelor&rsquo;s degreeisrequired In computer or any other related programs.
	3 to 5 years of experience.
	NYSC Certificate or Exemption letter is required.
	Hands-on experience with network infrastructure, telephone systems, and IT support.
	Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail.
	Excellent communication and teamwork abilities.
	IT certifications (e.g., CompTIA A+/Network+, Cisco CCNA) are a plus.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hr@cashx.ng&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

IT  & Network Support Manager Job at CashXpress Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        CashXpress Nigeria Limited, a fast-paced fintech organisation in Lagos, Nigeria, is recruiting to fill the following positions below:

Job Position: IT  & Network Support Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary 


	We are seeking a proactive IT professional to manage and optimize our network, telephony, and IT infrastructure.
	You will ensure smooth operations of our LAN, wireless systems, routers, switches, and telephone gateways, while providing technical support and troubleshooting for our team.


Key Responsibilities 
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Configure, manage, and maintain network devices (routers, switches, LAN/WAN, wireless) and telephone gateways.
	Provide PC troubleshooting, software support, and hardware maintenance.
	Ensure optimal network performance and IT security practices.
	Assist management with ad hoc IT tasks and office technology needs.


What  we're Looking For


	A bachelor’s degreeisrequired In computer or any other related programs.
	3 to 5 years of experience.
	NYSC Certificate or Exemption letter is required.
	Hands-on experience with network infrastructure, telephone systems, and IT support.
	Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail.
	Excellent communication and teamwork abilities.
	IT certifications (e.g., CompTIA A+/Network+, Cisco CCNA) are a plus.


Method of Application 
Interested candidates should send their CV to: hr@cashx.ng using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

	The Administrative Assistant will provide efficient administrative support to ensure smooth day-to-day office operations.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Social Media Manager",
  "description": "Dynambyte Solar Energy is a forward-thinking renewable energy company dedicated to providing sustainable and affordable solar solutions across residential, commercial, and industrial sectors. Our mission is to power communities with clean energy while promoting environmental responsibility and reducing dependence on fossil fuels.

With a team of experienced engineers, technicians, and energy consultants, we specialize in the design, installation, and maintenance of high-efficiency solar systems tailored to meet the unique energy needs of our clients. At Dynambyte, we combine innovation, quality, and customer-focused service to deliver reliable energy alternatives that drive long-term value.

Whether it&#39;s off-grid solar installations, hybrid systems, or energy storage solutions, Dynambyte Solar Energy is committed to lighting the path toward a greener, more sustainable future.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Ojo, Lagos
Employment Type:&nbsp;Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a serious and result driven social media manager to manage and grow our online presence across the Social Media Platforms.


Key Responsilbilities


	Create, schedule and post engaging content.
	Manage daily actiovities on all social media platforms.
	Respond to messages, comments and inquiries promptly
	Grow followers, engagement and brand visibility
	Provide basic performance reports.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess relevant qualifications.
	Proven experience managing social media accounts
	Good writing and communication skills
	Ability to work independently and meet deadlines
	Familiarity with platforms like Instagram, Tiktok and Facebook.


Salary
N150,000 - N180,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;Praisedynambyte@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Posiiton as the subject of the email.",

Social Media Manager Job at Dynambyte Solar Energy




        
    

        
        Dynambyte Solar Energy is a forward-thinking renewable energy company dedicated to providing sustainable and affordable solar solutions across residential, commercial, and industrial sectors. Our mission is to power communities with clean energy while promoting environmental responsibility and reducing dependence on fossil fuels.

With a team of experienced engineers, technicians, and energy consultants, we specialize in the design, installation, and maintenance of high-efficiency solar systems tailored to meet the unique energy needs of our clients. At Dynambyte, we combine innovation, quality, and customer-focused service to deliver reliable energy alternatives that drive long-term value.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Whether it's off-grid solar installations, hybrid systems, or energy storage solutions, Dynambyte Solar Energy is committed to lighting the path toward a greener, more sustainable future.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Manager

Job Location: Ojo, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a serious and result driven social media manager to manage and grow our online presence across the Social Media Platforms.


Key Responsilbilities


	Create, schedule and post engaging content.
	Manage daily actiovities on all social media platforms.
	Respond to messages, comments and inquiries promptly
	Grow followers, engagement and brand visibility
	Provide basic performance reports.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess relevant qualifications.
	Proven experience managing social media accounts
	Good writing and communication skills
	Ability to work independently and meet deadlines
	Familiarity with platforms like Instagram, Tiktok and Facebook.


Salary
N150,000 - N180,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: Praisedynambyte@gmail.com using the Job Posiiton as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
